fields.name: Admin
fields.description: Full system access — manage users, configure system, view all modules

fields.name: Manager
fields.description: Can approve/reject jobs, view all modules, manage operations

fields.name: Operations
fields.description: Can create and manage customers and jobs

fields.name: Finance
fields.description: Can manage invoices, payments, and financial reports

fields.name: Viewer
fields.description: Read-only access to customers, jobs, and reports
